key_decision: SPARC remains Tier 1 direct endpoint control; onset-boundary work requires Tier 2 H I/dynamical organization and Tier 3 gas/SFR proxy crossmatches rather than SPARC-only training.
claim_boundaries: M45 is a table builder and evidence availability audit, not an onset-law fit.
M45 does not train a new governor law and does not promote a model branch.
M45 does not refit M36 or change the mature BDVR endpoint.
Cross-dataset proxy rows are not direct activation detections.
Missing features are not fabricated; unavailable WHISP/WALLABY/ALFALFA/GALEX/WISE/SINGS/HERACLES channels are reported as missing or partial.
